---
title: "3 Things Everyone's Getting Wrong About AI"
description: "Three common AI literacy mistakes: projecting human qualities, treating AI as a monolith, and underestimating automation bias."
author: synesis
date: "2023-03-31"
categories: [AI, generative AI, AI literacy]
image: cover.jpg
---

![](cover.jpg)

AI literacy [[1]](#ref-1):

1. Don't project human qualities (beware of anthropomorphism)
2. Don't view AI as a monolith
3. Be skeptical of AI tools (beware of automation bias)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_3-things-everyones-getting-wrong-about-ai-activity-7047647052448608258-wWNe).*

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "3 things everyone's getting wrong about AI." *The Washington Post*. March 2023. <https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/03/22/ai-red-flags-misinformation/>
